lines.en:
Slide the lower screen
to look up and right

Slide the lower screen
to look up and left

Slide the lower screen
to roll your eyes around

Slide the lower screen
to look to stage left

Slide the lower screen
to look to stage right

Slide the lower screen
to look away from
stage right

Slide the lower screen
to look stage left,
right, then left again

Slide the lower screen
to get the mask off

Touch the lower screen:
Ai's penalty game!

Slide the lower screen
to tickle yourself

Slide the lower screen
to tickle Ryo
